title: AmoreCertResult
description: Output of certify-user-flow.{ps1,sh}. Written to state/cert/local-<os>-result.json. Contains one entry per gate (10 gates numbered 1-10). Schema version: 1.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this cert run (ISO-8601 timestamp or UUID).

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the cert script started.

finished_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the cert script finished (or was aborted).

overall_pass.description: True iff every executed gate passed.

release_tag.description: The release tag that was downloaded and tested (e.g. v1.0.2).

gates.description: One entry per gate, in gate number order.

pass.description: True if the gate completed without error.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of this gate in milliseconds.

error.description: Error detail when pass=false. Omitted when pass=true.

detail.description: Optional extra context (truncated stdout/stderr, path found, etc.).
